items.title: The Labor Market Keeps Flashing Mixed Signals
items.description: January was either a great or terrible start to the year for jobs, depending on the data.

items.title: This Cool iPhone App Can Instantly Transcribe Conversations in 100 Languages
items.description: Whisper Transcription, the latest iPhone app from Good Snooze, transcribes audio from meetings and voice memos in a wide variety of languages.

items.title: Allyson Felix Set Olympic Records. Then She Remade the Shoe Industry
items.description: The most decorated track and field athlete in history co-founded Saysh and designed the first running shoes made specifically for women’s feet.

items.title: How AI Deniers Are Setting Themselves Up for Failure
items.description: Whatever your opinion of AI, don’t fall into the trap of wishing it away. Because it’s not going anywhere.

items.title: A Rejected Candidate Keeps Demanding to Know Why I Didn’t Hire Him
items.description: Do I need to respond to his increasingly aggressive messages?
